brand_identity.name: Groove Media (Local Lead Systems)
brand_identity.target_audience: Busy home service contractors (Roofers, Landscapers, Painters) in Maryland

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines, heavy impact text

visual_enhancers.gradients: None for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise on Navy backgrounds to add grit.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use roughly 24px-32px for UI, 48px for feature icons.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Mobile: grid-cols-1, Tablet: grid-cols-2, Desktop: grid-cols-3 or grid-cols-12

mobile_first.buttons: w-full min-h-[48px] text-lg font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
mobile_first.header: Sticky with 'Call Now' button always visible

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B00] hover:bg-[#e66000] text-white rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1B365D] text-[#1B365D] hover:bg-[#1B365D] hover:text-white rounded-sm font-bold uppercase transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all rounded-sm

forms.input: h-12 bg-gray-50 border-gray-300 focus:border-[#1B365D] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1B365D] rounded-sm text-base
forms.label: text-sm font-bold text-[#1B365D] uppercase tracking-wide mb-1 block

motion.scroll: Use IntersectionObserver for fade-in-up animations on scroll

setup: Add Google Fonts for Barlow Condensed (Weights 700, 800) and Inter (400, 500, 600) in public/index.html
Configure Tailwind colors in tailwind.config.js as per the palette
Implement smooth scrolling behavior globally in CSS
implementation_order: 3. Construct Landing Page Sections (Hero, Features, Services, Form, Footer)
critical_rules: Mobile navigation must be extremely simple. No hamburgers if possible, just direct Call/Form access.
The 'Live Status' indicator must be visible in the Hero section.
Forms must use accessible labels and high-contrast inputs.
Do not use generic Lorem Ipsum. Use realistic copy related to contractors (e.g., 'Get More Leads', 'Roofing Leads in Rockville').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
